description: ABEMA is a Japanese video streaming service operated under the `abema-tv.com` domain. It provides online TV and on-demand video content.
summary: ABEMA exposes a public MCP server at `https://mcp-app-api.p-c3-e.abema-tv.com/mcp` with SSE transport and no authentication; no public HTTP/GraphQL APIs or CLIs were found for `abema-tv.com`.
